title: Demiurge's Toolkit — Opus (Character Wizard)
description: Character creation and advancement wizard engine: forma-driven multi-step wizard and paradigm tracking.

optional.reason: Enables complex prerequisite expressions in advancement gates. Without it, only simple has()/step.x==y prerequisites are evaluated.
Enables exemplar-grid fields in the creation wizard, populating species/archetype/vocation card grids from compiled compendiums. Without it, exemplar-grid fields render empty.
